subject: A green-skinned warrior with long dark hair, mouth open in a roar or war-cry, hoisting an axe overhead against a wall of orange-red flame
description: A mid-shot of a green-skinned figure — likely an orc or elf warrior — caught mid-rage. Long black hair whips around the head, mouth wide open in a screaming roar that bares teeth. The figure grips a heavy axe and lifts it overhead, biceps tensed. A leather strap or harness crosses the bare green torso. The entire background is a furious wash of orange and red flame, with darker scorch tones above and lighter yellow-orange near the figure. The pose and color story are pure berserker fury — heat, motion, and unrestrained aggression.
foreground: green-skinned warrior with raised axe, screaming
background: wall of orange and red flame
emotion: rage, fury, war-cry — head thrown, mouth open, weapon raised in unrestrained aggression
